title: agraphis serotina
intro: Agraphis serotina, also known as Agraphis serotina, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as relieving fever, reducing inflammation, and aiding in digestion. Agraphis serotina is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and can be consumed as a tea or used topically in the form of a poultice or ointment.
